# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-upload:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Build application
      run: npm run build

    - name: Upload artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: build-artifacts
        path: |
          dist/
          config/
          deployment-scripts/

    - name: Set up GitHub Pages for artifact distribution (optional)
      if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
      run: |
        echo "dist/*" >> .gitignore
        git add .
        git commit -m "Update build artifacts"
        git push origin main

    - name: Securely distribute artifacts (e.g., using a private repository or secure sharing service)
      # Add steps to securely distribute the artifacts as per your organization's security policies
